title: Salesforce Developer - Contract
description:
About the Role
We're seeking an experienced Salesforce Developer to join our team and drive the design, configuration, andsupport of Salesforce-based solutions. This role offers an exciting opportunity to work with cutting-edgeSalesforce technologies, particularly Salesforce Industries (Public Sector Solutions) and Omnistudio, whilecontributing to impactful projects that ensure system stability, scalability, and business alignment.

What You'll Do

Design and Build:
Create and configure Salesforce applications that meet complex business process andapplication requirements

Develop Solutions:
Enhance system functionality through strategic configurations and customdevelopment using Apex or Visualforce when needed

Leverage Omnistudio:
Utilize Salesforce Omnistudio components (Omniscripts, Integration Procedures,DataRaptors) to deliver scalable, efficient solutions

Manage Systems:
Configure and support packaged or SaaS applications, oversee releases, and maintainsystem stability

Drive Integration:
Conduct technical analysis and contribute to the design of system integrations andcustomizations

Collaborate Cross-Functionally:

Work with diverse teams to gather requirements, develop solutions,and implement enhancements

Ensure Quality:
Perform comprehensive testing and quality assurance to guarantee high reliability andperformance

Share Expertise:
Provide technical guidance, training, and support to team members and stakeholders onSalesforce features and best practices

Stay Current:
Keep up with industry trends, Salesforce updates, and best practices to continuouslyimprove system performance and team effectiveness

Required Qualifications

Certification (Must have at least one):

  • Salesforce Platform App Builder
  • Salesforce JavaScript Developer I
  • Salesforce Platform Developer I
  • Salesforce Platform Developer II
  • Or equivalent advanced-tier certification

Highly Preferred:

  • Proficiency in Salesforce Omnistudio (Omniscripts, Integration Procedures, DataRaptors)
  • Experience with Salesforce Industries / Public Sector Solutions

Beneficial:

  • Knowledge in Packaged Development Estimating
  • Packaged Application Integration experience
  • Software Platforms expertise

Personal Attributes

  • Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to design innovative, efficient solutions
  • Excellent communication and collaboration abilities
  • Proven track record of working effectively across teams
  • Demonstrated ability to take ownership of deliverables and contribute to key technical decisions

postedCompany.description: Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.
postedCompany.name: ZENITH INFOTECH (S) PTE LTD.
